name: Community National Bank in Monmouth
description_short: Community National Bank in Monmouth is a locally owned national bank serving Monmouth, Illinois and surrounding areas since 1964, offering traditional banking services with personalized community focus.
description_long: Community National Bank in Monmouth was founded in September 1964 after the local Second National Bank was liquidated earlier that year. Local business leaders organized to replace the lost banking services by obtaining a charter from the U.S. Comptroller of the Currency. The bank was capitalized through the sale of stock to over 400 area residents and opened for business on September 10, 1964, initially in temporary quarters before moving to its current North Main Street location. The bank celebrated its 50th anniversary in 2014 and remains a community-owned institution. Community National Bank offers standard retail and business banking services including checking and savings accounts, mobile banking, loan origination, and card services. They provide e-statements, check reordering, mobile banking applications, and lost/stolen card reporting. The bank accepts loan applications for various lending needs and maintains customer service support via phone (309-734-5131). Their service model emphasizes accessibility and convenience alongside traditional banking functions. The bank distinguishes itself through its community ownership structure and long-term local presence. Their marketing emphasizes being "Owned by the Community, Operated by the Community, To Serve the Community." The organization prides itself on maintaining basic banking principles while adapting to modern technology, transitioning from paper-based processes to mobile banking and digital services. Leadership has maintained focus on personalized service and local relationship-building despite industry evolution. As a traditional community bank, CNB serves the Monmouth area effectively for customers seeking local banking relationships and personalized service. The website provides limited detail about specific product features, rates, fees, or competitive advantages beyond the community-ownership messaging. For consumers comparing options, the lack of transparent rate and fee information is a limitation, and their service area appears geographically limited to Monmouth and surrounding regions.
services: Debit/credit cards with lost/stolen card reporting
pros: Locally owned and operated by community shareholders since 1964 with deep roots in Monmouth, Illinois
Offers mobile banking for remote transactions and account management
Provides both personal and business lending services with loan application assistance
Long track record of 50+ years of continuous operation and community service
Personalized customer service with dedicated staff support and local decision-making
Maintains accessible customer service phone line (309-734-5131) for card issues and inquiries
Full-service national bank with FDIC backing and Comptroller of the Currency charter
cons: Website provides no information about deposit rates, loan rates, or fee structures for comparison
Limited geographic service area restricted to Monmouth and immediate surrounding region
Minimal product detail or service specifications available online beyond basic service names
No information about account minimums, eligibility requirements, or specific lending terms
Website lacks details about business banking products, agricultural lending, or specialized services
best_for: Monmouth, Illinois residents and business owners seeking local banking relationships
Customers who prioritize community-owned financial institutions and local decision-making
Small businesses in the area needing personalized lending and banking services
Individuals who value in-person service and established community connections with their bank
diagnosis: Community National Bank is best for Monmouth-area residents and local business owners who prioritize community ownership, personalized service, and local banking relationships over online convenience or competitive rate shopping. The main caveat is that the bank's website provides minimal transparency about rates, fees, and specific product terms, making it difficult to evaluate how competitively their offerings compare to regional or national alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community National Bank in Monmouth serves Monmouth, Illinois with traditional banking and personalized service since 1964.
